title: murdannia crocea subsp. ochracea
intro: Murdannia crocea subsp. ochracea, also known as yellow mudan grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots and rhizomes are rich in bioactive compounds, which provide health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Murdannia crocea subsp. ochracea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
